message:
feat(packet-audit): land packet equivalence audit vocabulary [coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.32]

Adds src/model/packet_audit.rs with PacketEquivalenceAuditor: a stateless
helper that compares two ConversationPackets (raw scan vs canonical
replay) and surfaces drift as structured PacketProjectionDifference /
PacketHashDifference values.

PacketEquivalenceTolerance::strict() rejects every drift; ::allow_redaction()
excuses hash-only drift while still requiring analytics/lexical/semantic
projections to agree byte-for-byte. That tolerance class proves the
canonical persist sink delivers packet-equivalent projections under
secret redaction without forcing the comparator to ignore real drift.

Env knob CASS_INDEXER_PACKET_EQUIVALENCE_AUDIT defaults OFF (zero
production cost) and serves as the explicit kill-switch the bead
acceptance requires for a compare-mode rollout.

This slice ships the vocabulary + 5 unit tests; the call-site wiring
into persist_conversations_batched_inner is the follow-up slice once
the indexer/mod.rs lock is released by the in-flight architecture
work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
